Project README (first 3000 chars):
```
Display [Jujutsu's](https://github.com/jj-vcs/jj) `jj file annotate` (like `git blame`) in an interactive buffer. Works in any JJ repo, even in workspaces!

![Demo](assets/demo.png)

## Installation

Requires Nvim 0.10+.

```lua
vim.pack.add({
  "https://tangled.org/ronshavit.com/jjannotate.nvim",
})
```

## Usage

```lua
require("jjannotate").open()
require("jjannotate").toggle()
```

### Options

```lua
-- config is absolutely optional, no `.setup()` needed
vim.g.jjannotate_opts = {
  view = {
    -- whether to highlight all lines changed by cursor's change id
    highlight_lines = true,
  },
  ...
}
```

## Inspirations

I used [blame.nvim](https://github.com/FabijanZulj/blame.nvim) before creating this plugin, but needed something specifically for JJ.
```
